languages.text: "Понимаю, выбирать не приходится, но качество среднего солдата огорчает. Уже встречали сброд с Мерова?"

traits.locale_text: "Понимаю, выбирать не приходится, но качество среднего солдата огорчает. Уже встречали сброд с Мерова?"

languages.text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"
languages.original_text: "Понимаю, выбирать не приходится, но качество среднего солдата огорчает. Уже встречали сброд с Мерова?"

traits.locale_text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"
"I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"
"I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"

languages.text: "Ich weiß, Bettler dürfen nicht wählerisch sein, aber die Qualität des Durchschnittssoldaten ist deprimierend. Habt Ihr das Gesindel von Merov schon getroffen?"
languages.original_text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß, Bettler dürfen nicht wählerisch sein, aber die Qualität des Durchschnittssoldaten ist deprimierend. Habt Ihr das Gesindel von Merov schon getroffen?"

languages.text: “我知道有求于人就别想挑三拣四，但这群士兵平庸的素质真让人失望。你见过梅罗夫来的那群乌合之众了吗？”
languages.original_text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"

traits.locale_text: “我知道有求于人就别想挑三拣四，但这群士兵平庸的素质真让人失望。你见过梅罗夫来的那群乌合之众了吗？”

languages.text: « Je sais qu'on ne peut pas se permettre de faire la fine bouche, mais la qualité du soldat moyen est consternante. Vous avez vu la racaille de Merov ? »
languages.original_text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"

traits.locale_text: « Je sais qu'on ne peut pas se permettre de faire la fine bouche, mais la qualité du soldat moyen est consternante. Vous avez vu la racaille de Merov ? »

languages.text: «Ya sé que a buen hambre no hay pan duro, pero la calidad del soldado medio es deprimente. ¿Has conocido ya a la morralla de Merov?».
languages.original_text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"

traits.locale_text: «Ya sé que a buen hambre no hay pan duro, pero la calidad del soldado medio es deprimente. ¿Has conocido ya a la morralla de Merov?».

languages.text: "Zor durumdayken seçme şansımız olmadığını biliyorum ama ortalama bir askerin kalitesi iç karartıcı. Merov'dan gelenleri gördün mü?"
languages.original_text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"

traits.locale_text: "Zor durumdayken seçme şansımız olmadığını biliyorum ama ortalama bir askerin kalitesi iç karartıcı. Merov'dan gelenleri gördün mü?"

languages.text: 「乞食は選べないとは言うが、兵士の平均レベルは落胆する。メローの悪党たちと出会ったか？」
languages.original_text: "I know beggars can't be choosers, but the quality of the average soldier is depressing. Have you met the riffraff from Merov yet?"

traits.locale_text: 「乞食は選べないとは言うが、兵士の平均レベルは落胆する。メローの悪党たちと出会ったか？」
